title: The Crossing at East Cut | Populous
content: # The Crossing at East Cut. The Transbay Temporary Terminal, located on the blocks bounded by Folsom, Howard and Main Streets, used to provide temporary bus terminal facilities during the construction of the new Salesforce Transit Center. Working with East Cut Landing Partners, Populous transformed the nearly 3.5-acre block at the Transbay Temporary Terminal into an urban oasis designed for the community. Working with East Cut Landing Partners, Populous integrated and organized its vision for programming into an intersection of entertainment, wellness, community and immersive zones. Branding played a vital role in the creation of The Crossing at East Cut. Populous worked with East Cut Landing Partners to develop its brand foundation and visual assets that set the tone and a voice to the destination. As East Cut is an active neighborhood in San Francisco, branding elements for The Crossing had to work with the already established look and feel, as well as the existing conditions within the temporary bus terminal.

title: The Crossing at East Cut | San Francisco, CA
content: ## The Crossing. Host Your Event With Us. Grab a quick bite at Pita Gyros! Daily • 11 am - 8:30 pm. Monday to Thursday • 11 am - 7 pm | Friday to Sunday • 11 am - 8:30 pm. **The Crossing’s Outdoor Bar & Beer Garden**. Make sure to catch the daily happy hour from 3–6 pm for BOGO 50%. Grab a drink and catch the games on the big screen, and don’t forget about Trivia and Music Bingo rotating every Wednesday at 4:30 pm! Daily Happy Hour: 3 pm – 6 pm. Wednesday: 12 pm – 7 pm.
